recommendations.title: Bud Abbott and Lou Costello Meet Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: The Wolf Man tries to warn a dimwitted porter that Dracula wants his brain for Frankenstein monster's body.

recommendations.title: First Snow
recommendations.overview: A psychic's ominous reading sends a man into a tailspin.

recommendations.title: Don't Worry, I'm Fine
recommendations.overview: A 19-year-old searches for her twin brother after he runs away from home, following a fight with their father.

recommendations.title: ThanksKilling
recommendations.overview: A homicidal turkey axes off college kids during Thanksgiving break.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.

recommendations.title: The Oath
recommendations.overview: In a politically-divided United States, a man struggles to make it through the Thanksgiving holiday without destroying his family.

recommendations.title: Excess Baggage
recommendations.overview: A rich brat fakes her own kidnapping, but in the process ends up locked in the trunk of a car that gets stolen.

recommendations.title: Reality
recommendations.overview: A dark comedy centering on the lives of a Neapolitan based family whose father, a fish merchant, is so infatuated with the reality TV show "Grande Fratello" (the Italian version of "Big Brother") he starts living his life as if he were on it.

recommendations.title: Simple Simon
